title: OwnershipSurface
description: Reusable declared ownership-surface metadata. Parents compare this declared surface with leaf touch reports to classify sibling and dependency impact.
$comment: Keep the $id stable: artifact-envelope.schema.json references this file directly. Surface identifiers are constrained enough to preserve conflict-matching conventions while still allowing repo-local route and workflow names from ADR-3 examples.

owns_files.description: REQUIRED array. Repo-relative file paths or glob patterns this artifact declares ownership over. File surfaces are intentionally unprefixed unless referenced from depends_on as file:<path>.

items.description: Repo-relative file path or glob pattern. Absolute paths, parent-directory traversal, and whitespace are not valid surface identifiers.

owns_interfaces.description: REQUIRED array. Interface, route, command, or API-contract surfaces this artifact declares ownership over. Use HTTP route signatures such as GET /api/example or symbolic interface:<name> identifiers.

items.description: HTTP route signature or symbolic interface surface identifier.

owns_data.description: REQUIRED array. Data-store, config, or logical data-resource surfaces this artifact declares ownership over. Use prefixed identifiers such as table:<name> or config:<key>.

items.description: Prefixed data resource identifier. The prefix names the resource kind used for conflict matching.

owns_workflow_steps.description: REQUIRED array. Workflow steps this artifact declares ownership over. Use workflow:<step> for cross-artifact references or a domain-scoped step such as admin-settings:save.

items.description: Workflow step identifier. workflow:<step> is canonical for dependency references; domain-scoped steps such as admin-settings:save are accepted for owned or touched workflow steps.

depends_on.description: OPTIONAL array. Surface identifiers this artifact depends on but does not own. Dependencies must be explicitly prefixed, for example interface:auth-session, workflow:admin-shell-navigation, table:admin_settings, config:admin.settings.*, or file:src/shared/auth.ts.
